description_long: This bench features a seat and backrest constructed from horizontally arranged wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The frame and armrests are made from dark, marbled metal with elegant, flowing curves, providing both structural support and decorative flair. The armrests are integrated into the side supports, which extend down to form two robust, arching legs on either end. The wood appears weathered, suggesting durability for outdoor use, while the metal has a slightly glossy, marbled finish. The bench is wide enough to comfortably seat two to three people and is designed to be both functional and visually appealing in a public or park setting. The overall construction suggests a heavy, stable object that is not easily moved.
description: A rustic wooden bench with curved, marbled metal armrests and legs, featuring a slatted wood seat and backrest. The design is sturdy and decorative, suitable for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden seat and backrest, with both curved metal armrests visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the backrest and seat, as well as the ornate, flowing metal armrest and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the marbled metal back support and the thickness of the wooden planks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curvature of the armrest and the layered wood construction.
